title: ToolExposurePolicy
description: A policy describing which tools or toolsets are exposed on a given interaction surface. This policy can only reduce or reshape visibility relative to an underlying CapabilityPolicy; it cannot grant new authority.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

version.description: Semver version of this exposure policy.

transport.description: Transport or invocation surface this policy governs.

exposureMode.description: How tool visibility is reduced or curated.

capabilityPolicyRef.description: Optional governing capability policy this visibility policy reduces against.

defaultToolsets.description: Named default toolsets enabled before explicit include/exclude reduction.

includeTools.description: Explicit tool allow-list applied after toolset resolution.

excludeTools.description: Explicit tool deny-list applied after include resolution.

requireMutationConsent.description: Whether mutating tools require explicit runtime consent.

sensitiveDataMode.description: Whether sensitive tool outputs are blocked, redacted, or fully allowed.

lockdownMode.description: Whether tool results should be constrained to trusted or locally governed sources.
